column2: EVENT: Pakistan Night — Welcome Networking Evening
VENUE: Crowne Plaza Hotel (or similar) — Riyadh
VIP Seating Arrangement (50 Guests — Premium Setup)
Welcome Backdrop (8ft x 8ft, Flex + Frame) with Podium
06 Commercial Branding Panels (10ft x 10ft, Flex + Frame)
Table Branding, Name Plates & VIP Delegate Collateral
Cultural Night Performance (All Provinces incl. AJK & GB)
1. All prices are in Saudi Riyals (SAR).
2. Venue includes dinner for 400 guests; VIP seating for 50 quoted separately.
3. Sound system & 2 wireless mics are on-premise at the hotel venue.
4. Seating arrangements as per Embassy/PSEB guidelines.
5. PSEB reserves the right to adjust quantities as per final requirements.
6. Any additional requirements beyond this scope will be quoted separately.
7. This quotation is valid for 30 days from the date of issue.
